observedFailure: A second v0.1.13 installation refreshed the shared-project browser without showing the project visible on the primary installation.

diagnosis.confirmedProductDefect: The workspace picker and shared-project browser displayed only a Drive folder name, so same-name folders were indistinguishable across installations.
diagnosis.unconfirmedPhysicalCause: The two installations may have selected different Drive folder IDs; the update also stopped the opt-in LAN agents, so the second installation could not be remotely inspected in this session.

implementation: Every selected Drive workspace now has a visible short folder code derived from, but not equal to, its full Drive folder ID.
The picker adds folder code and modified date so same-name folders can be distinguished.
Every refresh reports the folder code, checked time, and exact project count or a visible sanitized error.

The explicit inspect_drive_project_discovery MCP tool performs a selected-workspace metadata refresh and returns at most 200 project/document identities without OAuth data, Drive file IDs, project titles, or document content.
The LAN coordinator can route that native tool independently on each authenticated installation.
remainingEvidence: Install the resulting build on both physical computers.
Restart both opt-in LAN agents after the installer closes their prior executable trees.
Call inspect_drive_project_discovery through lan_call on both nodes and require identical folderCode and project/document identity sets before claiming the two-install Drive gate.
